text.title: Video Prompt Engineering — Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: 5s cinematic walk-cycle prompt for Runway Gen-3 with brand locks.

example.title: prompt-template.yaml for brand X walk-cycle
example.code: provider: runway provider_overlay: "tracking shot from the right, slow dolly forward, motion blur on legs" max_chars: 480 sasscl: subject_slot: "{character_name}, mid-30s, wearing {wardrobe}" action_slot: "walking confidently, looking forward, slight smile" setting: "Lisbon riverside Cais do Sodré, late afternoon" style: "cinematic 35mm film grain, slight desaturation, brand X aesthetic" camera: "tracking shot from right side, slow dolly forward, 24mm wide lens" lighting: "golden hour, warm rim light from low west sun" brand_locks: [style, camera, lighting] eval: rubric_path: evals/brand-x-rubric.yaml sample_size: 5 promotion_threshold: 0.8 audit: cadence: weekly sample_pct: 1
example.note: r1 all 6 fields present, r2 Runway-style overlay, r3 5-gen + 0.8 threshold, r4 480 chars < 500 cap, r5 brand locks include style+camera+lighting.
